//: Hand-authored packaging scaffold so consumers (the dashboard) can import the generated TypeScript artifacts as a workspace package. The artifact MODULES (zod/zod.gen.ts, sdf-openapi-client.ts) are build output — regenerated by `make all` in packages/contracts and never hand-edited (ADR-0005). `make all` does not touch this file, so the drift gate (`git diff --exit-code codegen/`) stays green. Mirrors codegen/python/pyproject.toml.
name: @sdf/contracts
